SEARCH

所有类和接口

类
说明
AccountBookControllerImpl
The ledger controller implementation class handles the search, filtering and date processing logic of financial records.
AccountBookControllerImpl.CSVUtils
CSV file processing tool class.
AccountBookControllerImpl.ProcessedDates
Record for processed date range.
AccountBookControllerImpl.Record
 
AccountBookUi
 
AccountBookUiImpl
Implementation of the account book user interface, responsible for UI construction and interaction logic.
AIAnalyzeControllerImpl
AI Financial Analysis Controller that generates budget reports using the DeepSeek API.
AIAnalyzeUi
 
AIAnalyzeUiImpl
UI implementation for AI financial analysis, providing an interface to generate and view AI-driven budget reports.
BaseUi
 
BaseUiImpl
Base UI implementation for the account book application, providing core navigation and authentication views.
CSVImporter
CSV importer for parsing financial data into Entry objects.
DeepseekClassify
 
Entry
Represents a financial entry with date, amount, category, and description.
ImportController
Author SunMinghao HuangGuanren ChenBoliang Data 2025/4/18 ImportController 定义了导入控制器的业务逻辑方法。
ImportControllerImpl
CSV import/export controller for handling financial data reading, writing, and AI classification.
ImportUi
Author SunMinghao HuangGuanren ChenBoliang Data 2025/4/18 ImportUi 接口定义了导入界面层的功能。
ImportUiImpl
UI implementation for importing/exporting financial data and managing entries in a table.
main
 
MD5Util
 
ReportFormsController
 
ReportFormsControllerImpl
Controller for generating financial charts based on user expense data.
ReportFormsUi
 
ReportFormsUiImpl
UI implementation for generating and displaying financial reports with charts (bar, line, pie).
SettingController
 
SettingControllerImpl
Settings controller for managing application configurations and user finance data paths.
SettingUi
 
SettingUiImpl
UI implementation for application settings, including financial data directory management and user profile editing.
showException
 
UserController
用户控制器接口，定义用户注册、登录、注销及用户信息相关操作。
UserControllerImpl
User controller for managing user authentication, registration, and profile settings.
UserModel
Data model representing a user with authentication and profile details.
